title: Festive Christmas Night Market at Botanical Garden on Friday
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route Botanical...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Garden Route Botanical Garden is hosting a Christmas Night Market on Friday 19 December, from 17:00 to 21:00.


> The market promises to be a relaxed, family-friendly celebration under the stars. Visitors can look forward to a variety of craft stalls, offering unique handmade items ideal for last-minute Christmas gifts.


A selection of food and drink stalls will ensure there is something for everyone, while live music will add to the festive atmosphere throughout the evening.

A highlight for younger visitors will be a special appearance by Santa Claus, giving children the chance to meet him in person. Parents are encouraged to ensure that children bring along their letters for Santa, adding an extra touch of excitement to the night.

The Christmas Night Market aims to bring families and friends together in one of George’s most scenic outdoor venues, while also supporting local vendors and artisans.

The event will take place at the Garden Route Botanical Garden, 49 Caledon Street and is open to the public.

Organisers invite the community to come and enjoy an evening of music, food and fun in a beautiful setting.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
